name: Closing reset checklist
description: Close-down checklist covering stock, prep, cleanliness, unresolved issues, and anything that would poison the next day's readiness if left implicit.
source_ref: core-v2: reset discipline should preserve the next operating cycle, not just finish the current one
usage_moment: Use at close before team members leave and before unresolved issues are handed over.
expected_output: A signed close record with completed reset items, unresolved blockers, and explicit carry-forward actions.
